name: Intercity, Local, or School Bus Gasoline Refund

eligibility.description: Applies to school buses and scheduled intercity/local buses; non-scheduled buses must have a seating capacity of at least 20 adults.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Operators of school buses and certain intercity or local buses available to the general public can claim a refund of the federal gasoline excise tax.
